entries.name: invoice-mark-overdue
entries.purpose: Nightly 01:00 UTC: find invoices where due_date < now() AND status IN ('open', 'partially_paid') and transition to 'past_due'. Kicks off the dunning ladder via InvoicePastDue event.

entries.name: invoice-dispatch-dunning
entries.purpose: Daily at 09:00 tenant-local: sweep past_due invoices + dispatch the appropriate dunning stage (day_3 / day_7 / day_14 / day_30 / day_60). Timezone is per-tenant so dunning emails arrive at business hours. Enterprise-only-cadence variations apply per tenant settings.

entries.name: invoice-dispatch-due-soon
entries.purpose: Daily at 10:00 tenant-local: send InvoiceDueSoonNotification for invoices where due_date IN (today + 3 days, today + 1 day) AND status IN ('open', 'partially_paid'). Suppressed for customers with auto-pay enabled.

entries.name: invoice-reconcile-payments
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:00 UTC: recompute invoices.amount_paid_cents from the transactions ledger. Detects drift + emits P1 metric on findings. Enterprise deployments run this more frequently via override in settings.

entries.name: invoice-escalate-to-collections
entries.purpose: Nightly 04:00 UTC: sweep past-due invoices where days_past_due >= config('invoice.collection.send_to_collections_after_days', 60) AND tenant holds invoice_collections_integration entitlement. Dispatches EscalateDunningToCollectionsJob per eligible invoice.

entries.name: invoice-purge-expired
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 05:00 UTC: apply the per-entity retention windows. Invoices > 7y (10 for Enterprise) migrate to compliance archive; PDFs migrate S3 hot → Glacier. Credit notes NEVER auto-purged.

entries.name: invoice-monthly-revenue-report
entries.purpose: Monthly 06:00 UTC on the 1st: compute per-tenant revenue report for the previous calendar month. Delivered via notification (InvoiceMonthlyRevenueReportReadyNotification — declared but not in the standard notifications.json day-1 set) to finance-role subscribers.

entries.name: invoice-quarterly-write-off-digest
entries.purpose: Quarterly on the 1st (Jan/Apr/Jul/Oct): compute the written-off invoice digest for the previous quarter. Feeds InvoiceWrittenOffNotification (quarterly digest to admin+finance).

entries.name: invoice-reset-monthly-quota
entries.purpose: Monthly 00:00 UTC on the 1st: reset invoice_slot_per_month consumed counters for every tenant. Delegates to the entitlements module's monthly-slot-reset infrastructure.

entries.name: invoice-detect-stale-drafts
entries.purpose: Weekly Monday 08:00 UTC: find invoices in status='draft' AND created_at < now() - interval '90 days'. Emits stackra.invoice.stale_drafts gauge. Ops decides whether to void + archive or preserve.
